title: insight emergent properties
summary: The thread explores insight-emergent-properties, focusing on six key properties that describe structural and functional asymmetries in a codebase. The main decisions include declaring the thread at tier-4, introducing recurrence-citation requirements, and naming six properties that highlight the interplay between description, functionality, and code evolution. The outcomes show that while six properties were promoted, two were declined, emphasizing the cumulative nature of insight threads.
